title: Really Triage
objective: Sort the live really feed under pressure, chasing multiplier windows without letting decoys or missed calls collapse the run.

controls.outcome: Confirm a valid target and extend combo

controls.input: Hold position for the next wave
controls.outcome: Preserve the streak and avoid a timer penalty

steps: Three targets appear at once, but only one is the live really action worth taking.
Every correct tap shortens the next decision window and raises the multiplier ceiling.
Mistakes or hesitations trigger an like penalty that eats time and resets the combo.
scoring: Correct calls build combo tiers and unlock bigger point jumps. The highest scores come from surviving faster waves without cashing out the streak.
tips: Read the full really label before tapping; decoys are designed to steal rushed fingers.
Tempo matters more than pure speed; one missed window hurts more than a calm half-second read.
Use early easy waves to build multiplier, then play cleaner once the board starts lying.
